space.$description: Semantic names, not numbered indices (space-0..16) — rem, not px, so spacing scales with the user's browser font-size/zoom preference like the rest of this repo's sizing (see tokens/core/typography.json). Consolidated from the old 12-step scale to 7 named tiers; the dropped in-between values (20px/28px/40px/48px/64px) had zero real component consumers when this was renamed.
